follow_ups.title: Configurable input hotkeys
follow_ups.reason: Right Command plus period is a better fixed default than Option plus Space, but productized distribution should allow users to resolve keyboard-layout or app-level shortcut conflicts.

follow_ups.title: Asynchronous paste verification
follow_ups.reason: Manual physical-key testing showed that the previous synchronous paste verification could block the main event loop during the exact final-panel re-record window. This work was pulled into the current feature to keep Right Option replacement responsive while the prior output is still being verified.

follow_ups.title: Dependency-injected AppController integration tests
follow_ups.reason: The replacement feature now has automated coverage for the extracted audio session gate, hotkey event interpreter, paste event plan, and listening indicator. Full AppController replacement tests still require injectable audio, ASR, panel, paste, and history collaborators instead of the current concrete macOS-owned dependencies.
